basic_details.job_title: NIMHANS Recruitment 2026 - Walkin Clinical Psychologist/ PSW Post
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) has published the Clinical Psychologist/Psychiatric Social Worker Recruitment 2026 Notification under Advertisement No. NIMH/PROJ/DSK/CP(PSW)/2009/NOTIF/2026-2027. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Clinical Psychologist/Psychiatric Social Worker position on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 35 years of age with M.Phil in Clinical Psychology or M.Phil in Psychiatric Social Work are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 08 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

qualification.details: MPhil (Clinical Psychology) or MPhil (Psychiatric Social Work) from a recognized University/Institution. Proficiency in spoken and written Malayalam.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIMHANS recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on or before the specified time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Clinical Psychologist/Psychiatric Social Worker post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MPhil in Clinical Psychology or MPhil in Psychiatric Social Work from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Psychologist/Psychiatric Social Worker position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 68,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NIMHANS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this job?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in-cum-Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the NIMHANS office in Bengaluru, Karnataka (Pincode: 560029).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is NIMH/PROJ/DSK/CP(PSW)/2009/NOTIF/2026-2027.
